Driver for the eWD1000 touch controller and definitions for configuring touch sensor hardware interfaces.


## Files
- **[ewd1000.c](ewd1000.c.md)**: Driver implementation for the eWD1000 touch controller, including initialization and event handling.
- **[touch_sensor_definitions.h](touch_sensor_definitions.h.md)**: Defines the `TouchSensor` structure for configuring touch sensor hardware interfaces.
